posts.author: Blindox (Ricardo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello.

I created an automation to create an item for each email that contains the variables that I chose. The problem is that for each response that I receive on my email I have a new item created. Is there a way to merge, combine automatically( or even manually) all the items with the same characteristic ?
